personal.summary: Results-driven B.Tech CSE graduate with a proven track record in software development, design & architecture, and a passion for solving simple & complex problems. A strategic problem-solver with strong technical, interpersonal & communication skills, committed to delivering high-impact outcomes across Software Development, Cloud & AI.

experiences.title: Assoc SW Engineer
experiences.description:
Part of an agile Cloud Cost Optimization (FinOps) team, developing a platform to analyze, visualize & optimize cloud spend for Fortune 500 companies, achieving 30% average cost savings. The platform maximises business value by aligning cloud spending with business objectives.
	•	Architected & developed scalable & resilient microservices for a Hybrid Cloud Cost Optimization platform, enabling cost management, auto-scaling, right-sizing of cloud resources & proactive cloud governance with enhanced visibility for 50k + customers.
	•	E2E ownership of FinOps AI agent built using LangGraph, with multi-decision, multi-agent orchestration across RAG, Costs API, Cube, Waste Detection, ITAM Agents featuring parallel & serial workflows backed by redistributed memory manager & zero-trust guardrails for access & data security.
	•	Shipped 10+ AI agents automating FinOps workflows—from spend analysis & visualization to cost attribution, intelligent rightsizing, and actionable cost optimization
	•	Trained ML models for AI recommendations, budgeting-forecasting, pattern recognition & anomaly detection in cloud spends optimising & achieving measurable savings.
	•	Developed & enhanced resource level breakdown APIs, enabling granular cost by categorizing cloud expenses across line items, services, regions & usage patterns.
	•	Build scalable cloud bill parsers for multiple cloud vendors & datarbricks to ingest, plot & store cost data in datalakehouse enabling cost management & optimization.
	•	Designed high-performance ETL pipeline to transform, normalize & plot cloud billing data, streamlining usage analytics & cost attribution.
	•	Developed robust gRPC & REST APIs enabling 21% cloud cost savings via async non-blocking flows through optimized execution models, efficient data aggregation, tuned persistence layers and improved service scalibility under load.
	•	Collaborated cross-functionally with multiple teams on the entire product lifecycle, including discovery, feasibility, market research & technical architecture.
	•	Maintained a 100% resolution rate for P1/P2 incidents during on-call rotations & adhering to a 15-minute SLA, minimizing downtime & enhancing team efficiency through comprehensive technical documentation.

experiences.title: SDE Intern
experiences.description:
Contributing to the Finvolv Core Platform Team and actively involved in building a highly configurable, domain-rich, low-code Loan Origination System (LOS) and Loan Management System (LMS), with end-to-end ownership of core modules including IAM and the Workspace Portal.
	•	Developed an advanced IAM system addressing complex financial hierarchies and intricate authentication and authorization scenarios, enabling seamless role-based access control while meeting strict compliance requirements.
	•	Engineered a custom API layer on top of Keycloak to satisfy rigorous security standards, implementing multi-level authorization flows, fraud-detection hooks, and compliance-ready audit trails, resulting in a 45% improvement in tokenization efficiency.
	•	Built high-performance REST APIs for credit evaluation systems and customer onboarding workflows, achieving 30% faster response times through caching, pagination, and message queuing, along with database indexing, connection pooling, and query optimization.
	•	Designed and streamlined an event-driven integration framework between Loan Origination and Loan Management system modules using Kafka, improving reliability and efficiency of credit evaluation workflows.
	•	Implemented Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) using Keycloak, significantly enhancing platform security while maintaining a smooth and user-friendly authentication experience.

Enhanced user engagement with content via ML techniques.
	•	Designed & developed AI-driven content interaction enhancements by implementing real-time metadata enrichment & automated indexing, significantly improving discoverability & user engagement for OTT platforms.
	•	Built an advanced workflow integrating Computer Vision (CNN) & Natural Language Processing (BERT) to recognize objects & generate feature maps for image processing—enabling model optimization through iterative training & increasing system accuracy over time.
	•	Strengthened content recommendation, personalization, real-time analytics & targeted advertising via intelligent content analysis & metadata tagging.
	•	Orchestrated real-time & on-the-fly event recognition & content tagging for dynamic video streams, enhancing metadata design & searchability by more than 50%.
experiences.title: ML Intern

education.coursework: Data Science, Software Engineering, AI Engineer
education.activities: 5 semester x Scholarships — Ronin (Top 1%) on Coding Ninjas — 500+ (GFG+Leetcode) — ACM member — GDSC member — 1st in GAI & Code of Honour

skills.skillsRaw: Technical Skills: Python, Java, Go — Dev Frameworks like Django/Flask, Gin, SpringBoot, Streamlit, Rest, gRPC, GraphQL — AWS (EC2 , S3, SNS, SQS, Bedrock, Q, SageMaker, Lambda, RDS , DynamoDB) & GCP — ML Tools like LangChain, LlamaIndex, Haystack, OpenAI, Claude — Testing frameworks like JUnit, Jest & Mockito — ReactJS &VueJS — Apache Kafka & Druid — Redis, OAuth2.0 — SQL, MongoDB — PySpark, Databricks, PowerBI — ML Frameworks — Linux, Shell, Bitbucket , K8s/K9, Docker, Github Actions/Jenkins, Prometheus, Graphana — CodeQL & ESLint.

preferences.desiredRoles: Assoc SW Engineer, SW Engineer, Data Engineering , AI Engineer, AI/ML Engineer, ML Engineer
